name: animacraft
description: The Fully onchain Character Maker & Creator

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check chain-runtime.js && node --check draft-store.js && node --check living-content.js && node --check manifest-validation.js && node --check recipe-hash.js && node --check remote-read.js && node --check runtime-config.js && node --check maker-v4.js && node --check maker-renderer.js && node --check maker-rules.js && node --check expansion-packs.js && node --check maker-publication-v4.js && node --check maker-workspace.js && node --check maker-workspace-i18n.js && node --check maker-workspace-store.js && node --check maker-command-store.js && node --check maker-document-ops.js && node --check maker-assets.js && node --check maker-color.js && node --check scripts/import-angie-v4.mjs && node --check scripts/mainnet-preflight.mjs && npm run preflight:config && npm test && npm run build
scripts.makers:verify: python3 -m py_compile scripts/chroma_key.py scripts/build-builtin-makers.py && node --test test/bundled-makers.test.js
